data.title: Pull Shark
data.description: Opened pull requests that have been merged

data.title: YOLO
data.description: Merged a pull request without code review

data.title: Quickdraw
data.description: Closed an issue or pull request within 5 minutes of opening

data.title: Arctic Code Vault Contributor
data.description: Contributed code to repositories in the 2020 GitHub Archive Program

data.title: Pair Extraordinaire
data.description: Co-authored commits on merged pull requests

data.title: Starstruck
data.description: Created a repository that has many stars
